ramadan.title: Ramadan
ramadan.subtitle: Fasting schedule, traditions & guidance
ramadan.suhoorDesc: Eat a nutritious meal before dawn to sustain energy throughout the day. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Take suhoor, for in suhoor there is blessing.'
ramadan.fastingDesc: Abstain from food, drink, and other physical needs from dawn to sunset. One of the Five Pillars of Islam.
ramadan.iftarDesc: Break your fast at sunset, traditionally with dates and water following the Sunnah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ.
ramadan.quranRecitationDesc: Ramadan is the month the Quran was revealed. Muslims aim to complete the entire Quran during this blessed month.
ramadan.taraweehPrayersDesc: Special nightly prayers performed in congregation during Ramadan, usually 8 or 20 rakats.
ramadan.zakatCharityDesc: Increase charitable giving during Ramadan. Zakat al-Fitr is obligatory before Eid prayer.
ramadan.laylatAlQadrDesc: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months. Seek it in the odd nights of the last ten days of Ramadan (21st, 23rd, 25th, 27th, 29th).
ramadan.tip1: Stay hydrated during suhoor — drink plenty of water
ramadan.tip2: Eat dates and fruits at iftar before the main meal
ramadan.tip3: Read at least 1 juz (chapter) of Quran daily
ramadan.tip4: Make extra dua before breaking fast — it's accepted
ramadan.tip5: Seek Laylat al-Qadr in the last 10 nights
ramadan.tip6: Increase charity and help those in need

boycott.title: Boycott Scanner
boycott.subtitle: Support Palestine 🇵🇸 — Check products & brands
boycott.scanProductDesc: Use your camera to scan a barcode and instantly check if the product is on the boycott list
boycott.browseDirectoryDesc: Explore the full boycott directory — filter by category, risk level, and find alternatives
boycott.searchProductDesc: Search by product name or enter a barcode to look up any product across global databases
boycott.whyBoycottDesc: The BDS (Boycott, Divestment, Sanctions) movement works to end international support for apartheid and oppression of Palestinians. By choosing where to spend your money, you can make a difference.

dhikr.laIlahaIllallahMeaning: There is no god but Allah
